The taxonomy of Schizonotus argenteus is currently recognized within the scientific community. However, more specific information on its classification might require further research. This genus is found in various parts of the world.
uses: Schizonotus argenteus, also known as the silver sedge, has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits.
